questions.title: How do you handle deployment rollbacks?
questions.body: Describe your team's process for rolling back a failed deployment. Include details about decision criteria, communication protocols, and post-rollback analysis.

questions.title: What monitoring alerts are critical for production?
questions.body: Which alerts do you consider must-have for a production service? Explain the thresholds and escalation paths for each.

questions.title: How do you manage secrets in your CI/CD pipeline?
questions.body: Walk through how secrets (API keys, database credentials) are stored, rotated, and injected during the build and deploy process.
